allow: Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match '\\''uvicorn|next dev|next-server'\\'' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine')
Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.ParentProcessId -eq 53868 } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine')
